title: Device Settings - Settings UI: UI, animation
scenario: Device Settings page tabs collapse/expand with sliding animation and UI elements match Figma design on connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and paired.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open the Device Settings page.
4. Observe the Device Settings page layout — verify that all tabs (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) are displayed and collapsed by default.
5. Tap on one of the collapsed tabs (e.g., Audio Settings) to expand it.
6. Observe the expansion animation — verify it slides open smoothly with proper animation.
7. Tap the same expanded tab again to collapse it.
8. Observe the collapse animation — verify it slides closed smoothly with proper animation.
9. Repeat steps 5–8 for each remaining tab (ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications).
10. For each expanded tab, verify that all UI elements (text labels, toggle positions, slider positions, divider lines, spacing) match the Figma design specifications.
expected: All tabs are displayed and collapsed by default. Each tab expands and collapses with a smooth sliding animation. All UI elements (text, position, lines) match the Figma design.
